security_checks.summary: Repository validation rejects common private keys, API tokens, credential URLs, and machine-specific private paths. Radeon evidence scripts record sanitized hashes, excerpts, endpoint classes, and counts rather than secrets, model weights, prompts, vectors, or private source bodies.
Runtime readiness, model benchmark, embedding benchmark, and evidence runner require loopback model and embedding endpoints for the competition profile.
Raw source snapshots, model weights, candidate configuration, and Radeon runtime reports must remain outside Git and be reviewed before closure.
